parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow_id: 'CONTRACT_TEST', workflow_name: 'PLATFORM_CONTRACT_TEST', node_name: 'Synthetic Canary', error_message: 'CONTRACT_TEST canary — not a real error', error_category: 'contract_test', severity: 'LOW', execution_id: 'canary-' + Date.now(), execution_url: '', is_transient: false, timestamp: $json.timestamp }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: '#n8n-alerts', text: ':x: CONTRACT TEST FAILED — ' + $json.failCount + '/' + $json.totalTests + ' tests failed', blocks: [{ type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: ':x: Platform Contract Test FAILED', emoji: true }}, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: '*' + $json.failCount + ' of ' + $json.totalTests + ' tests failed*\n' + $json.tests.filter(t => !t.pass).map(t => ':red_circle: ' + t.test + ': ' + t.details).join('\n') }}] }) }}
